productName: Green Revolution Doozies PLUS Strawberry Pineapple 1:1:1 + Maca
description: A gourmet sweet, juicy strawberry gummy imagined with island-grown cane sugar, orchard fruit, and the kind of small-batch technique usually reserved for handmade luxury candies. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity in a 1:1:1 ratio. A dessert-style hybrid treat with the kind of flavor that makes dosing feel like a reward.
